---
title: "lowpass"
generated: true
description: "Zero-phase frequency-domain low-pass: keep frequencies below `cutoff`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.signal.filter`](../nitrix-signal-filter.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:lowpass -->
```python
lowpass(X: Num[Array, '... obs'], *, fs: float = 1.0, cutoff: float, ftype: _FilterType = 'maxflat', order: int = 2, transition: Optional[float] = None, axis: int = -1, padding: int = 0) -> Num[Array, '... obs']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:lowpass -->
Zero-phase frequency-domain low-pass: keep frequencies below `cutoff`.

Passes frequencies below `cutoff` and attenuates those above, applied
zero-phase as a real magnitude weight over the rfft grid.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:lowpass -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `X` | `Num` | `...` × `obs` | — | Signal; the filtered axis is last by default (`axis`). |
| `fs` | `float` | — | `1.0` | Sampling frequency in Hz. Pass `fs = 1 / TR` for fMRI. |
| `cutoff` | `float` | — | — | Pass-band edge in Hz (`0 < cutoff < fs / 2`). |
| `ftype` | `_FilterType` | — | `'maxflat'` | Magnitude-window design: `'maxflat'` (default; the Butterworth magnitude *shape*, applied zero-phase -- a frequency-sampled FIR, not a recursive IIR Butterworth -- see [`iir_filter`](../nitrix-signal-filter/iir_filter.qmd) for that), `'ideal'` (brick wall), or `'cosine'` (raised-cosine edges). |
| `order` | `int` | — | `2` | Steepness of the `'maxflat'` roll-off (the exponent of the Butterworth magnitude shape). Ignored for the other designs. Default `2`. |
| `transition` | `Optional[float]` | — | `None` | Raised-cosine transition width in Hz (`'cosine'` only); defaults to 10 % of Nyquist. |
| `axis` | `int` | — | `-1` | Axis to filter. Default `-1` (trailing time/observation axis). |
| `padding` | `int` | — | `0` | Reflect-pad this many samples on each end before filtering, then crop -- reduces the circular-convolution wrap-around at the edges. Default `0` (pure FFT). |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `...` × `obs`. Filtered signal, same shape as `X`. Differentiable through `X`; `fs` / `cutoff` / `order` are static.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:lowpass -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `obs` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
